privileged_info_summary: The dataset used is TitanicSurvival.csv. The task calculates a Chi-Square test of Independence for passengerClass vs. survived, stratified by sex. Ground truth analysis using python scipy chi2_contingency confirms that for females, the Chi-Square statistic is 115.70 with a p-value near 0. For males, the Chi-Square statistic is 33.03 with a p-value near 0. The results are expected to be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/stratified_results.txt' and the project saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicStratified.omv'.
